name: transaction-construction-loan
rationale: Construction loan scenario: financing the building of a new property. Construction draws are draw-against-progress, not single-disbursement. Vienna's canonical_map treats loan as single-amount; construction loans have draw schedule, completion timeline, progress inspection requirements not modeled. Layer 3: does Vienna support construction loans or are they explicit out-of-scope? Architecture-amendment risk: if construction-loan support requires NEW canonical fields (draw_schedule, completion_date, lender_inspection_required), surface as Phase 1 matrix amendment.
notes: Single-event sequence. Fixture uses existing canonical fields with construction-loan content; PRODUCT-DESIGN item flags whether canonical_map needs amendment.
